progress_reward.issue: mean 0.160, but external score is very negative; progress alone insufficient to overcome penalties

stability_penalty.issue: mean -0.340, nonzero_rate 1.0, dominates total reward; agent penalized for moving

soft_landing_bonus.issue: nonzero_rate 0.005, rarely triggered; too sparse to guide learning

reasoning: stability_penalty dominates (mean -0.340, nonzero 1.0) causing early failure/crash; progress_reward too weak (mean 0.160) to counteract; soft_landing_bonus too sparse (0.5% trigger). Recommend reducing stability_penalty coefficient and increasing progress_reward coefficient.
new_lessons: stability_penalty coefficient must be reduced to avoid penalty dominance
progress_reward coefficient should be increased to drive learning
